title: Roadside Coaching-Institute Banner: brand-graded hero, vector icon set, halftone geometry + print-ready CMYK PDF export
one_line_ask: Prepare every visual asset for the DYNAMIC SOLUTION CLASSES 10ft x 5ft roadside banner — brand-graded student hero, vector subject icons, brand-colour halftone geometry — and export the authored InDesign layout to a print-ready CMYK PDF for large-format flex printing.

issues: Visible text 'A B' in the open book icon (acceptable per brief, but noted)
Stroke weight appears uniform but cannot be precisely measured visually; assumed correct per brief
No anti-alias fringing or major artifacts detected
All icons are clear, minimal, and on a pure white background
No real-world brands or trademarks visible
Sigma symbol appears slightly simplified/stylized rather than a perfectly proportioned mathematical sigma, but acceptable for icon use
DNA helix could have slightly more consistent strand spacing
Minor variation in perceived stroke weight between icons (beaker vs globe) but within acceptable tolerance for a source file
CMYK breakdowns are present but not verified for absolute accuracy against the hex codes (designer should check).
Swatch rectangles are slightly soft-edged (acceptable per brief, but not perfectly crisp).
Background is off-white rather than pure white (acceptable per brief).
